name: Table Card
description: 数据表格卡片，适合价格对比、计划列表、数据清单，支持深浅色、RTL、移动端横向滚动

template.css: .table-card{background:var(--card-bg,#fff);border:1px solid var(--card-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:var(--card-radius,18px);padding:var(--card-padding,24px);box-shadow:var(--card-shadow,0 12px 30px rgba(15,23,42,.06));width:100%}.table-card-title{font-size:var(--title-font-size,22px);font-weight:var(--title-font-weight,700);color:var(--title-color,#0f172a);margin:0 0 6px}.table-card-desc{font-size:var(--description-font-size,14px);color:var(--description-color,#64748b);margin:0 0 16px}.table-wrap{overflow:auto}.styled-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:640px}.styled-table th,.styled-table td{padding:14px 16px;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:14px}.styled-table thead th{background:#f8fafc;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a}.styled-table tbody tr:hover{background:#fafafa}.dark .table-card,[data-theme="dark"] .table-card{background:#0f172a;border-color:#1e293b}.dark .table-card-title,[data-theme="dark"] .table-card-title{color:#f8fafc}.dark .table-card-desc,[data-theme="dark"] .table-card-desc{color:#94a3b8}.dark .styled-table thead th,[data-theme="dark"] .styled-table thead th{background:#111827;color:#e5e7eb}.dark .styled-table th,.dark .styled-table td,[data-theme="dark"] .styled-table th,[data-theme="dark"] .styled-table td{border-color:#1f2937;color:#cbd5e1}.dark .styled-table tbody tr:hover,[data-theme="dark"] .styled-table tbody tr:hover{background:#111827}[dir="rtl"] .styled-table th,[dir="rtl"] .styled-table td{text-align:right}

description.default: Use this block to compare products, plans, features, or datasets.
